message:
fix(gateway): code review fixes for agent service and audit

- Fix stale comment in audit.ts (DB writes are now implemented, not future)
- Add void prefix to fire-and-forget Promise for lint clarity
- Fix cursor parsing in listAgents to match getAgentOutput (safe NaN handling)
- Fix timeout parameter being accepted but ignored in spawnAgent
- Store timeout in AgentRecord and return actual value in getAgent

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
